name: Gregory Lang
background: Mr. Lang has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. Prior to joining NOVAGOLD, he served as President of Barrick Gold North America. He has held various senior executive positions at Barrick Gold Corporation and Homestake Mining Company.

company_affiliations.name: NOVAGOLD RESOURCES INC.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer

company_affiliations.name: Barrick Gold Corporation
company_affiliations.title_or_role: President, Barrick Gold North America; Managing Director, Barrick Gold Australia; Vice President, Australian Operations
